demo.name: 12-Pounders
description: Reliable cannons suited to a wide range of naval engagements.

EA0_10.name: 24-Pounders
description: Powerful, well-balanced cannon forming the backbone of many naval batteries.

EA0_10.name: 24-Pounders: Devastating
description: Guns favored for raking fire that punish alignment errors brutally.
Their shots tear through decks, guns, and crew alike, leaving damage that worsens with every blow.

EA0_10.name: 36-Pounders
description: Massive cannons built to deliver crushing blows.
Reserved for ships capable of bearing its weight and recoil.
